text.title: AI Pair-Coding Prompt Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated ai-pair-coding-prompt-patterns artefact.

step.name: classify-task
step.action: Map task to one of 7 patterns: new endpoint/feature → spec-first; tests missing → test-first; navigating existing code → repo-grep; reviewing PR → diff-review; rename/structural → refactor-isolate; multi-step → plan-then-execute; risky change → branch-canary.

step.name: fill-scaffold
step.action: Fill stop_conditions (>=1), acceptance_checklist (>=3), repo_grep_targets when relevant.

step.name: freeze-and-run
step.action: Hand scaffold to the AI pair; do not edit mid-run.

step.name: score-against-checklist
step.action: Tick each checklist item; record any miss as a rework reason.

step.name: close
step.action: Land diff if all items pass; otherwise return to scaffold with concrete miss reasons.
step.decision-gate: any checklist miss → rework loop, do not merge.
